entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: Petoberfest is a manual load for the badges.  We don't have anything like the tutorial system that will trigger badge assignment when you post in the community.  The team is working on pulling that data today and hopefully the badges are assigned late today or early tomorrow.

entry.title: Re: Define Pricing Condition Table
entry.content:
Hi Lakshmipathi,

I have an issue with the generated program for the condition table.

In the upgraded system I can see the different offset value whereas in non-upgraded system differs.

 

Could you please tell me what the difference is for this even checked in V/05 in both systems all same.

entry.title: Re: How can we extract a field as of a specific date in a...
entry.content:
Hi @Konstantina 

There is something I am not understanding in the requirement.

If it is the driver to different bonus plans as you say in the first sentence (which means potentially different weightings between sections etc), why would we only want the value as of one date as you say in the second sentence ? 

We have the point in time feature which retrieves all information from EC as one date but you probably know about this already so I'm guessing it's more complicated than that.

I think maybe it's a phrasing issue and we can chat about it to clarify, unless you can provide an example with actual employee data in this conversation ?

Feel free to send me an invitation for tomorrow Tuesday between 9am and 5 pm Pacific time to discuss.

xavier dot le dot garrec (at) sap dot com

Thanks

Xavier

entry.title: Can I analyze the usage of a web dynpro application?
entry.content: In ST03N, I can analyse the usage of transactions. Is there a similar tool for web dynpro applications? I have an old application and want to find out, if it is still being used...

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Thanks for the give us the opportunity to skill up through Digital Skills Initiative.

I have over 5 years of hands-on experience as an SAP HCM as an end-user, where I have developed a deep understanding of HR processes and SAP system functionality. My role involved managing employee data, processing payroll, and generating comprehensive HR reports.

Currently, I plan to switch to my career as SAP HCM (SuccessFactors ECP) Certified Consultant and eager to learn the SAP Function module.

My experience has equipped me with strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and a solid foundation in SAP HCM and I am confident that my experience will help for SAP certification.

Regards, 
Pratim

entry.title: max users in a team
entry.content:
For a team, is there a max number of users that can be assigned to it?

We have a team that we need to assign all users too, once all assigned it initially looks good but then when going back into the teams section it removes people till there is only 180 left. I wonder if this is a limit but can not see any documentation to confirm this.

entry.title: Re: The Love-Hate Relationship with Networking
entry.content:
Thank you for this thoughtful post about Networking. Unfortunately as you stated, it really is important to your career development.

Although I am an extrovert, I had to intentionally learn how to network once I realized how important it was. 

Years ago I came across this book at a conference. I used to have it on a CD and listen to it in my car on the way to events to boost my confidence. It really did help and the biggest tip I have held on to was to act like a host and try to make others feel comfortable.

Fine Art of Small Talk: How To Start a Conversation, Keep It Going, Build Networking Skills -- and Leave a Positive Impression! 

One other thing that I've started doing recently with virtual meetings is showing up a few minutes early to chat with the other participants as they join. I guess I'm still acting like a host!

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content: Did you 'Customer can also send OSS message to SAP.'

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori List Report Utilizing CDS View with Parameters
entry.content:
Hi @AnkurBajpai ,

I have posted a similar question: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-use-parameterized-cds-view-for-exposed-association/qaq-p/13883224

But in my case the association entity is parameterized CDS view means when I click on any record on List report object page should open(using association). But here associated entity is cds view with parameter? So, how can I pass parameter values?

entry.title: Change order of budgets in SuccessFactors Compensation Module
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have a client requirement with 4 different budget in the compensation module:

Merit, Target Bonus, Promotion and Overall. Our calculations for each budget works perfectly as per client requirements. 

The system per defult however shows unfortunately the budgets in the following order: 

1. Merit 2. Promotion 3. Overall 4.Target Bonus

Is there a way to configure this display order in the template or via the xml?

@xavierlegarrec @pmacgovern Any ideas?

Thanks! Melina

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP - post SAP TechEd y Devtoberfest 2024 en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content: Hi Antonio, The event time is 17:30 for the calendar, the text for 24th says 18:30. "24 de octubre de 2024 a las 18:30 hora local en el Honest Greens de Castellana". Es a las 17:30 o a las 18:30? Abrazo, Phil

entry.title: EBRR: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer project - Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer projects and project-based sales, has been delivered with S/4 Public Cloud 2408.

A French customer of mine has this requirement for the Private Cloud. I am not seeing this in the RoadMap explorer. Do you know if/when this functionality will be available in the Private Cloud?

Thank you,

Christine

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content: There isn't a direct replacement for CJI3N. Go into Fiori, App Finder and select the SAP Menu tab and search for CJI3N. It will find it.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS latest tcode for obsolete T codes
entry.content: Right now PS is in a transition phase moving from the old CO tables to the new ACDOCP and ACDOCA. You need to investigate which tables a report uses.

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content: Please refer the below ABAP screen. I am not a ABAPer and unable to understand. Guide me if possible.

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded in Base64 from a mime multipart format emai
entry.content:
def attachments = message.getAttachments();
attachments.values().each{ attachment ->
  def inputStream = attachment.getInputStream();
  def result = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
  def buffer = new byte[1024];
  def length;
    while ((length = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
        result.write(buffer, 0, length);
     }
  def byteArray = result.toByteArray();
   message.setProperty("attachment_body", byteArray);
}

entry.title: Re: Bug in Access Control SP23?
entry.content: I have the same issue and I checked this note but still it is not resolved.

entry.title: Re: API to get details of purchase order changes in S4 Ha...
entry.content: yes- i am looking for the purchase order changes, like we see data in table CDHDR & CDPOS

entry.title: Re: API to get details of purchase order changes in S4 Ha...
entry.content: yes- i am looking API which will give details similar the table data of CDHDR & CDPOS

entry.title: Re: Release of UI5 linter v1.0
entry.content: Congrats! 🎉 Already used it before the official v1 release, can't wait to see where this goes in the future. Already a very useful tool. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Fields empty After Saving and empty in Executive review
entry.content:
Hi @lindaweiler8 

I would need to have access to the environment to know for sure what is happening but based on the requirement you formulated here is how I would write the formula:

If(geozone="AUT",cust_newmonthlysalary*14,cust_newmonthlysalary*12)

After the condition is what meets the condition and after the second comma it what is always true if the condition isn't met.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP Business AI Cheat Sheet – Your Quick Reference Guide
entry.content: Very well documented & useful

entry.title: Re: Change order of budgets in SuccessFactors Compensatio...
entry.content:
Hi @Melina512 

Yes you can reorder them but my experience is that it doesn't work by re-ordering them from top to bottom in the UI, it only works if you re-order them from top to bottom in the XML.

make sure the budget-calc as well as the budget labels (2 different places) are in the right order from top to bottom (left to right on worksheet) in the xml then relaunch worksheets.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Identity Services logon against SAP ECC or S4...
entry.content: This looks like a path forward! Marking this as solution and will give this go. Thank you for the support.

entry.title: Find all WBS element related to a WBS node in a CDS
entry.content:
Hello,

In a CDS, I read another CDS giving me a list of WBS nodes. How could I find all the WBS related to a node. Ex :

I received the node C.00103.1 and get in return C.00103.1.1 and C.00103.1.2.3

C.00103.1

   C.00103.1.1

   C.00103.1.2.3

C.00103.2

   C.00103.2.1 etc

II had a look in table PRHI but it doesn't give what I want.

Thanks in advance

Mat

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
dear Mr. David 

i have an issu (Payment method is not supported, select a different payment method to proceed with order. [18-57CH82FJ] ) when i submit  of Campaign code Can you support me

entry.title: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition
entry.content:
Hello 

Greetings

Has anyone ingested .parquet file in SAP PaPM on-premise edition. I am aware that there is a 'file adapter' function, but i believe this is only used for ingesting \ loading .csv or .xls file formats only.

If we have to ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition, then what is the best and the recommended way of doing so?

@JustinAngeles

@emanuele_fumeo 

Thanks

Amogh

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded...
entry.content:
def attachments = message.getAttachments();
attachments.values().each{ attachment ->
  def inputStream = attachment.getInputStream();
  def result = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
  def buffer = new byte[1024];
  def length;
    while ((length = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
        result.write(buffer, 0, length);
     }
  def byteArray = result.toByteArray();
   message.setProperty("attachment_body", byteArray);
}

entry.title: MD61/MD62/MD63 - Assistance with PIR Quantity Aggregation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’ve created my Master Plan in SOP using a daily period bucket and will be transferring the SOP data to Demand Management as PIR. Its getting transferred as "Daily Bucket".

I need to aggregate the PIR quantity into a monthly bucket in MD63. I looked into the Period Total option in User Parameters, but it didn’t meet my needs.

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Dinesh Kumar V

entry.title: clientAPI.binding for Android and iOS devices - problems with media files
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I hope you're doing well. I'm currently working on a scenario where users can upload "news" that includes data such as text, title, etc., along with an image. I'm facing a couple of issues and would greatly appreciate any guidance or help.

To give you some context on how I'm handling the news upload:

1.I created a News entity (NOTICIA) that is created using an ODataService.CreateEntity action.

{ "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.CreateEntity", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "CrearNoticiaOData" }, "OnFailure": { "Name": "/BTP6S/Actions/GenericMessageBox.action", "Properties": { "Message": "#ActionResults:CrearNoticiaOData/error" } }, "OnSuccess": { "Name": "/BTP6S/Actions/Generic/GenericToastMessage.action", "Properties": { "OnSuccess": "/BTP6S/Actions/ClosePage.action", "Message": "¡Creaste una nueva noticia! Los cambios se verán reflejados al sincronizar." } }, "Target": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIA" }, "Properties": { "TITULO": "#Control:FormCell_Titulo/#Value", "CUERPO": "#Control:FormCell_Cuerpo/#Value", "AREA_ID": "#Page:Noticias_Crear/#Control:FormCell_AreaId/#SelectedValue", "AUTOR_ID": "#Control:FormCell_AutorId/#SelectedValue" } }

2.After creating the news, I created another entity called NewsMedia (NOTICIAMEDIA), which is uploaded using an ODataService.UploadStream action.

{ "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.UploadStream", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "NoticiaMedia_Upload" }, "OnFailure": "/BTP6S/Actions/Noticias/Error.action", "OnSuccess": "/BTP6S/Actions/ClosePage.action", "Target": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIAMEDIA", "QueryOptions": "$filter=NOTICIA_ID eq {NOTICIA/ID}" }, "Properties": { "CONTENIDO": "#Control:FCAttach/#Value" } }

3.Finally, I link the NewsMedia (NOTICIAMEDIA) entity to the respective news (NOTICIA) item using an ODataService.UpdateEntity action.

{ "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.UpdateEntity", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "OData_EnlazarNoticiaMedia_Noticia" }, "OnFailure": "/BTP6S/Actions/Error_EnlazarNoticiaMedia.action", "OnSuccess": "/BTP6S/Actions/Noticias/Message_EnlazarNoticiaMedia.action", "Target": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIA", "QueryOptions": "$filter=ID eq {{#Control:FormCell_NoticiaId/#Value}}" }, "Properties": { "NOTICIAMEDIA_ID": "#Control:FormCell_NoticiaMediaId/#Value" } } 

My Issues:
1. Separate ABMs for Uploading News and Images: I haven't been able to find a solution to allow users to create news and upload an image at the same time using the same ABM. As of now, they must upload the news and the image separately in two different ABMs. Any clarification or advice on how I could combine this process would be highly appreciated.

2. Image Display Issue on Android: When users try to view the news and image on their devices, the image appears fine on iOS devices, but it doesn't show up on Android devices. I'm using an Image control, and for the image field, I call the following rule:

On Android devices, it seems like clientAPI.binding does not include the property CONTENIDO@odata.mediaReadLink, whereas this property is present for iOS users. To make this clearer, I'll attach screenshots of how clientAPI.binding prints on both operating systems.|

For Android devices:

 

 


For iOS devices:

 

 

 

Has anyone encountered this behavior or know of any workarounds?

For additional context, I'm attaching the metadata of my CAP service.

Any guidance, help, or advice would be greatly appreciated!

Additional code:

Page:
{ "Controls": [ { "FilterFeedbackBar": { "ShowAllFilters": false, "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar" }, "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable", "_Name": "SectionedTable0", "Sections": [ { "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": false, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "_Type": "Section.Type.Image", "_Name": "SectionImage0", "Header": { "_Type": "SectionCommon.Type.Header", "_Name": "SectionCommonTypeHeader0", "AccessoryType": "None", "UseTopPadding": true, "Caption": "{NOTICIA/TITULO}" }, "Visible": true, "Image": "/BTP6S/Rules/VerContenidoImagen.js", "Alignment": "Center", "ContentMode": "ScaleAspectFit" }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "/BTP6S/Rules/FormatoFecha.js", "_Name": "KeyValue2", "KeyName": "Fecha de publicación", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue2", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "{CUERPO}", "_Name": "KeyValue1", "KeyName": "Desarrollo", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue1", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "/BTP6S/Rules/VerContenidoImagen.js", "_Name": "KeyValue4", "KeyName": "URL Image", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue4", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "KeyAndValues": [ { "Value": "/BTP6S/Rules/ShowBinding.js", "_Name": "KeyValue3", "KeyName": "Binding datos", "Visible": true } ], "MaxItemCount": 1, "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue", "_Name": "SectionKeyValue3", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Layout": { "NumberOfColumns": 2 } }, { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "Layout": { "LayoutType": "Vertical", "HorizontalAlignment": "Leading" }, "_Type": "Section.Type.ButtonTable", "_Name": "SectionButtonTable0", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false }, "Buttons": [ { "Styles": { "Button": "MainButton" }, "_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button", "_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton0", "Title": "Me gusta", "Alignment": "Center", "ButtonType": "Text", "Semantic": "Tint", "Image": "sap-icon://heart-2", "ImagePosition": "Leading", "FullWidth": true, "Visible": "/BTP6S/Rules/TieneLike.js", "Enabled": true, "OnPress": "/BTP6S/Rules/HandleNoticia_Like.js" }, { "Styles": { "Button": "MainButton" }, "_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button", "_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton1", "Title": "No me gusta", "Alignment": "Center", "ButtonType": "Text", "Semantic": "Tint", "Image": "sap-icon://heart", "ImagePosition": "Leading", "FullWidth": true, "Visible": "/BTP6S/Rules/NoTieneLike.js", "Enabled": true, "OnPress": "/BTP6S/Rules/HandleNoticia_Like.js" } ] } ] } ], "DesignTimeTarget": { "Service": "/BTP6S/Services/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx.service", "EntitySet": "NOTICIAPERSONALIKE", "QueryOptions": "$expand=NOTICIA" }, "_Type": "Page", "_Name": "Noticias_Detail", "Caption": "Noticia", "PrefersLargeCaption": true, "ActionBar": { "Items": [ { "_Name": "ActionBarItem0", "Caption": "Editar noticia", "SystemItem": "Edit", "Position": "Right", "IsIconCircular": false, "Visible": true, "OnPress": "/BTP6S/Actions/Noticias/NavTo_NoticiasUpdate.action" } ], "_Name": "ActionBar1" } }

entry.title: User ID generation in Onboarding with external ATS
entry.content:
Our landscape consists of: External ATS -> SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 -> SuccessFactors Employee Central.

Within this setup, we are unable to create a rule that enforces the generation of Person ID and User ID following the Employee Central Sequence (it seems that This business rule is honored only when the new hire is onboarded from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting).

Has anyone found a potential workaround?

entry.title: Re: Substance Volume Tracking Block Purchase Orders S/HAN...
entry.content:
Hello Michael,

Regarding your first question: "So it is planned to also block the business process in case the thresholds are exceeded right?"
Yes, this is correct. We are planning a functionality that allows to block business documents like Purchase Orders, Deliveries, Sales Orders, Production/Process Orders,... if the system determines that a threshold for a substance would be exceeded with the execution of the corresponding business transaction.

Regarding your second question: "... when is it planned to implement this functionality (include planned quantities and blocking of business process)"
Currently this functionality is listed in the Roadmap Explorer under Product Vision (for Product Marketability and Compliance) which means the release in which we plan to deliver the functionality has not yet been determined. We do review and evaluate our planning for all functional areas which belong to the new Product Compliance solution every 6 months. As soon as we have set a target release for a new innovation in a certain area, we will update the quarterly planning in the roadmap explorer accordingly.

Regarding your third question: "Especially for REACH it is mandatory to separate imports from non-EU. How is this possible in SVT?"
Please have a look at the SAP Online Help for Substance Volume Tracking - section: "Periodic Tracking": 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/477ce1286ded4f7a87be331af790c8f7.html?locale=en-US
Here we describe in a detailed flow chart which steps are executed by the system after a a Material Document was selected by the substance volume tracking process. You can click on each step in the chart to get more detailed information about the step.
Based on the example of a Purchase Order, on a high level, we perform the following steps in order to determine if a Material Document (goods receipt) is tracking relevant under EU REACH:
- Based on the address of the Goods Supplier (Supplier, Supplying Plant, ...) we determine the source country of the purchased product
- Based on the address of the Goods Recipient (Receiving Company, Receiving Plant, ...) we determine the target country of the purchased product
- Based on the definition for the EU REACH Registration Status compliance requirement we determine the countries for which the EU regulation is relevant
- If the source country of the purchased product is not part of the EU REACH relevant countries and the target country is part of the EU REACH relevant countries, we know that the Purchase Order was leading to an import of the purchased product into the EU REACH area (and is therefore tracking relevant under EU REACH).

Please keep in mind that this is a very simple example. As you can see from the flow chart in the documentation, we do consider several more criteria during the evaluation of Material Documents.

Regarding your fourth question: "Is it planned also to be possible to manage more than one threshold?"
The threshold which you currently see in the compliance requirement definition is only the lowest substance volume default threshold for a given regulation. In the future we plan to manage thresholds on a much more granular level (e.g. substance, registration type, legal entity, registration-valid-from and registration-valid-to).

Best regards,
Michael Schalk (SAP)
Product Manager for Substance Volume Tracking

entry.title: Re: Release of UI5 linter v1.0
entry.content: Agree with @wridgeu, a great tool. Few things missing, but they already on the roadmap or have a open pull request.  Great to apply best practices to a project.

entry.title: Re: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition
entry.content: Hi Amogh, unfortunately I don't have any experience with PaPM and parquet files. But parquet files are typical data lake files (they were born for Hadoop), therefore volumes could be huge. It might be better to load them directly to the underlying SAP HANA database. If Justine cannot help, you could try involving an SAP HANA expert. Hope it helps

entry.title: PaPM cloud, how to calculate IRR
entry.content:
Hi everybody

In SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM cloud) I need to calculate IRR, I was try to use a RFC function with Python code ussing  IRR fromnumpy_financial library, but unfortunately it's not possible buscause apparently it doesn't support the library.

Somebody knows other ways ussgin python or other function in papm.

 

I apreciate any helps

 

Regards.

 

Juan

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Data Modeling with the latest features of ABAP Core Data Services
entry.content: Wow !!....I was waiting on how did you fill the "tables entity" with the records...since everything is custom.....How is it done?

entry.title: Fiori attachments storage into OpenText archive
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As Fiori doesn't support Archivelink or GOS feature in most of its apps, we have configured content repository in OACO with storage area as DMS but OpenText core archive as the host. How can we verify the documents uploaded from Fiori apps are uploaded in OpenText archive. 

-After documents are uploaded in Fiori, the source is displayed as DMS (refer attached screenshot), so it is ambiguous the content is stored in which system.

-Which table or where in S/4 system can I check the document is going to OpenText. Unlike in Archivelink tables TOA01, etc, I dont see such doc type, repository information for documents uploaded in Fiori.

-OpenText Core Archive connector simply displays volume details in chart report but no individual document details, that too after 12 hours of upload the report gets refreshed with docs read, written. Logs are on remote server, not straight forward to find a way how to check this when storage area in the repository is DMS but host server is OpenText. 

-Also, has anyone used OpenText Business Object Browser in Fiori? Will it work with ADA license without VIM or would require VIM / xECM license?

Appreciate any inputs or suggestions. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Declaración de Impuestos para Argentina: ¿Porque es necesario rellenar el campo Reason 0 VAT en
entry.content:
Hola, 

Para agregar info, si necesitan que un documento con IVA cero desde SD (sin Indicador de impuestos específico), determine una razón de IVA cero, existe la siguiente nota: 2964861 - Argentina Tax Reporting (RPFIGLAR_TAXREPORTING): Default 0% VAT Reason from FIARV_TAXID for Accounting Documents Posted through SD

entry.title: How to Automate Datasphere CLI using python
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to automate the Datasphere CLI using python.

Example: As per the below blog via CLI it's manual activity.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/use-crud-opreations-with-sap-datasphere-command-line-interface/ba-p/13682690

Suppose there is scenario, we have 50 replication flows, i want to update some content in JSON file. Manual Activity takes more time. So by using Python we are able to do it but authentication is blocking for manual intervention. While automate each command it is asking some token code. To streamline this process, please suggest some steps to bypassing the authentication step through automation using Python.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Porto
entry.content: Our SAP Meetup was really great! It was a nice event to get to know each other after the SAP CodeJam and before the SAP Inside Track in Porto.

entry.title: index.cds not automatically honored in CAP node.js plugins
entry.content:
I have application (a) and 2 plugins (p1 and p2). In P2's db folder i created a file x.cds that contains an extension

 

extend entity domaind.Bla with {
...additional fields
}
 
also in P2 I reference 
a) p1 in the package.json
b) the file x.cds in an index.cds (that I thought would automatically be used)
 
The problem is that the extensions don't seem to be actively going into effect UNLESS, I specify a using somewhere in my app. 
I was under the impression that if I specify 'index.cds' it will be called and used to possibly define additional services, data models etc. I admit, I might be using plugins different than everybody else at the moment, but wanted to know what the general intent is. 
My work around right now is to simply add 
 
using from '[p2 package name] 
into one of my files in the db folder of the app and that seems to be doing the trick. 
 
So my Question is: Is there a standard .cds file that is honored when a plugin is used? At the moment the only entry point seems to be cds-plugin.js

entry.title: Why Without replenishment lead time not available in Hana after conversion
entry.content: We have recently done ecc to s4 hana conversion (Brown Field). But the without replenishment lead time is not there in new system OVZ9. Any idea.

entry.title: Re: Unable to display USRACL table on S/4 HANA
entry.content: How can we access the data from USRACL considering all authorizations also?

entry.title: ESM support for CAP plugins
entry.content:
I developed a plugin but declared it as type:module in the package.json. 

Once I started using it, it blew up on me. After some debugging i found this in 'sap/cds/lib/plugin.js'

// TODO: support ESM plugins. But see cap/cds/pull/1838#issuecomment-1177200 !
 
Can I suggest adding something to the CAP documentation a) to let people know that ESM modules are not supported as plugins at the moment and b) is there an ETA when you are planning to do so?

entry.title: Re: A problem occurred while checking the system health (NO_RESPONSE)
entry.content: SAP Desktop Agent needs to be installed to resolve the issue. Refer OSS - 3202981

entry.title: Re: A problem occurred while checking the system health (...
entry.content: SAP Desktop Agent needs to be installed to resolve the issue. Refer OSS - 3202981

entry.title: Need a way to access the contents of a table via a program on S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Due to changes in Module "VIEW_AUTHORITY_CHECK" in latest release S/4HANA 2023 (on-premise), we are unable to pass authority check for table USRACL via program. We get an exception "INVALID_ACTION" on S/4HANA 2023, though any lower S/4 release passes the authority check properly.

Please let us know any alternate way of accessing this table.

Regards,

Bhavya

entry.title: Re: Need: Access to SAP Signavio Process Governance (30-d...
entry.content:
Hello Wilko,

Do you know if there´s any news regarding this, I have hit the same wall.

Thanks a lot in advance!

Best regards,

Jessé

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP World,

I am grateful of the SAP Community for giving an opportunity to me to upskill my SAP skills , i want to apply under the category of "First generation college students" , as having a SAP certification would help me to start by aspiring SAP Career.

Thanks again to @David_Chaviano  and @KatherineKenneally for it.

Regards

Sachin Dabas

entry.title: Re: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-pr...
entry.content:
Thanks for your quick response @emanuele_fumeo 

I agree with your comments on the volumes and shall check with my HANA expert.

Another option I was thinking is to get this data from datalake into HANA DB via Integration Suite / CI (as our HANA DB is hosted in BTP)  but my doubt is can the PaPM on premise edition read the data from this BTP hosted HANA DB via SDA using a Model HANA view?

entry.title: unable to open attachment in the invoice in PDF
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are use ECC 6.0

one of my team member while trying to open the attachment in the invoice it is displayed and disappear in 2 secs.

but when i tried i can open the attachment in the PDF. is it a role missing issue or and settings need to be changed ?  please help if you have gone through this type of issue before.

steps we followed to open attachment are below:

1. opened purchase order and click on invoice. now invoice opened.

2. go to systems and click on services for object and click on the icon that opens the attachment.

for me getting a pop up to open/save the attachment like below, but for my team member it is not coming.

 

please help.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content: Hi!!! Any news about this issue?

entry.title: Re: 🟢 The Art & Science of CAP
entry.content: looking forward to the followup session

entry.title: Absence Pools - How do they work?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a Public Sector customer who is using Absence Pools (Donated Leave). They are having an issue, but I am not very familiar with how this functionality works. I have looked at SAP Help and the help in the IMG, but it does not give a good picture of how the tables and infotypes are tied together. 

Does anyone know of a blog or other helpful information that I can look at to get a better picture of how this should work?

Here are some of my questions:

  • The employee has a Home Pool and Foreign Pool. How do I know which pool will be deducted?
  • How can I find the current balance in each pool? I see table T5UPBSPOOL, but not sure if those are the current balances.
  • The error that they are getting is 'Total hours/amount belows the low watermark of the pool.". This is when they try to create IT0613 withdrawal. 
    • There is no amount in T5UPBSPOOL for the grouping that the employee belongs to, but there is an amount in the Foreign Pool.
    • The low watermark for all of the pools in V_T5UPBSPOOLT is '0'.
    • The initial balance for the assigned Foreign Pool in V_T5UPBSPOOLM is higher than the amount in T5UPBSPOOL.

Any assistance or direction would be appreciated.

Thank you,

Cindy

entry.title: Re: Problems with the new SAP build service
entry.content: The keystore file I used for a successful build last July has no values for Subject and Issuer (Unknown). I wonder if the new SAP Build service is more strict about this?

entry.title: Re: CAP Node JS Event Mesh Consume Message failed with payload chunks buffer
entry.content: As an FYI - SAP Event Stream Processor was an on premise product that is now past EOMM. SAP Event Stream Processor was not related to SAP Event Mesh so you can remove the SAP Event Stream Processor tag.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Test Double Mechanisms with ABAP Unit - Your Friend in Achieving Effective Test Automation
entry.content:
Although I will revisit the session, missed it (office hours), I have a doubt, maybe I missed it while it was playing in the background.

As far as I remember, the FM test environment doesn't work for RFC-enabled FMs. (or something similar) Do we still have the limitation? (I can give it a try again tomorrow, now I am used to wrapping such FMs in test-seam, but I don't know better)
I vaguely remember reading somewhere that some flavor of the "test-seam" is in the works( I could be very wrong about this ). 

Oh and nice session, auth check helper was new for me. 👍

entry.title: EWM - cannot change the storage behavior
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am modifying the storage behavior, for my storage type.

The stock is already empty, there is no WT or OT required, but when I try to change to 2 - Bulk storage, the system tells me that there is stock, and returns the message below.

I see one problem, in transaction scwm/ls02 I can see 36 HU in storage bin, but is not real, in ph stock is 0.

entry.title: Re: LMS Calendar invites
entry.content: @JamesGogolski, can you check if "Suppress Informational ICS Attachments for Email Notifications" is enabled? This KBA can assist with the situation: 2524303.

entry.title: Instructor Led Course limit Number of Days
entry.content:
Is it possible to expand the Number of Days limit for Instructor Led Course?

Currently, the limit is 60 days, but the customer needs to add a new learning item that has 90 days. How to proceed?

Kind Regards

Carolina Faria

entry.title: Re: How to increase length of domain 'SETVAL' from char24->char40?
entry.content: What do u mean about 'link', i have materialid with matnr_int and matnr_ext in it.

entry.title: Can you connect eclipse oxygen to sap btp server currently ?
entry.content: is this a supported option currently for custom adapter development on sap BTP.

entry.title: Re: SF Learning reports restrict remote option
entry.content: @SandyAlton, if you set "remoteFtpEnabled" to "false", the "Remote File" option won't be available, but that'd impact all admins. So, the restriction via the admin role would be a route to be explored (either by limiting the access via security domains or by not adding permission to run the given report).

entry.title: Re: unable to open attachment in the invoice in PDF
entry.content: Ask the user to display the last authorization checks (SU53). Alternatively, you may run the authorization trace (STAUTHTRACE).

entry.title: Re: index.cds not automatically honored in CAP node.js pl...
entry.content:
Hi @martinstenzig,

Did you try adding a requires section to your plugin referencing the model?

Haven't tested it myself, but for example the change-tracking plugin uses an index.cds and adds a reference to the model in the requires section of package.json of the plugin. (Which I assume will automatically load the contents of the index.cds file when the plugin configuration is merged with the root project's configuration)

https://github.com/cap-js/change-tracking/blob/457a2a0cf9c95f3c4af75dc23dfcd68ce2aa30ee/package.json#L35

Worth a try I think 😊

Cheers,

Geert-Jan

entry.title: Re: PDI - SAP Cloud Application Studio 2402 (Pilot) - "On...
entry.content:
I'm using 2408 version and I still have this issue;

I started to have it since I started using the pilot version.

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content: You need to log on with an S-user in order to access support notes.

entry.title: Re: index.cds not automatically honored in CAP node.js pl...
entry.content: Geert, good idea. I think the problem I have though is that I don't want to "overwrite" the original model defined in P1 in P2 but just extend it. So If I would add the required section in P2, the original service related required section implicitly defined in P1 would be plowed over.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content: looks like something wrong with the badges, just got two identical badges , same description but different badge numbers

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently working through the “Deploy a CAP Business Service to SAP Business Technology Platform” tutorial, but I’ve hit a roadblock at step 3.2 and I’m unsure how to proceed from here.

Has anyone successfully completed this step? I would really appreciate any guidance or tips on how to move forward.

Additionally, I’ve submitted feedback for this tutorial on GitHub, requesting further clarification that might benefit others facing the same issue. You can check it out here.

Thanks in advance for any help!

Best regards,
Francisco Milan.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Extension Setting for File Name Output in SAP...
entry.content: I just followed the blog and successfully got the proper unzipped files with dynamic extensions. However, one thing that you are doing different is using FTP instead of SFTP. Can you try this setup using an SFTP receiver?

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Now I know why I am not able to secure a job with SAP ecosystem after immigrating to Canada. I was saying "sap" when referring to SAP and was overlooked due to this simple mistake. I should have said each letter: S-A-P.


Pro tip: Do not say the word "sap" in interviews or networking events when referring to SAP. You can immediately be overlooked due to this simple mistake. Be sure to say each letter: S.A.P.

entry.title: Re: If a new item is added to a curricula, does it get re...
entry.content: @Heather_Lewis, as far as I understood the situation, I'd say that users would be notified about the course assignment via the "ApmStudentLearningPlanNotification", when the "Learning Plan Email Notification" automatic process runs - the "Learning Plan Email Notification Settings" should be enabled. The curricula status would be changed from "complete" to "incomplete". The "Curriculum/Program Maintenance" automatic process might be reviewed as well. As there are different entities and configurations involved, it's recommended to first try it out in preview, then apply in prod.

entry.title: Re: Maratona da F110 - Programa de Pagamento Automático
entry.content:
Boa tarde,
Gostaria de uma ajuda.
Tenho 2 empresas em países diferentes, porém as duas tem uma forma de pagamento (H) comum, porém as configurações são diferente.
Argentina

Brasil (criada a pouco tempo)

Agora ao gerar a F110 para Argentina estamos tendo uma mensagem de erro, onde parece que esta verificando a configuração do Brasil.

Alguém já passou por uma situação dessas e poderia me ajudar?

entry.title: Re: Your SAP on Azure – Part 18 – The story of a missing CSRF token
entry.content: you are my lifesaver. Thanks so much for the sharing !

entry.title: Re: Remove Action in Important Learning section of the ne...
entry.content: @barryelissa, they wouldn't get notified. You could review the Enabling Non-required Items as Removable Assignments for Learners to try different types of configurations.

entry.title: Re: Building custom Excel view in SAPUI5 : Technical Part 4 ( export as excel with multiple workshee
entry.content:
Hi @TrusPatel;
Thank you for taking my feedback on board.
Unfortunately, there are still some points that could be greatly improved.

First of all, it's not entirely your fault, but please make sure that there is less whitespace. This makes it very hard to read the blog well. I know it's not easy on the platform.

Your code samples are really difficult to use when you divide methods into many different parts. I would highly recommend creating a GitHub repo so that readers can better understand how to use your code.

The use of jQuery is highly discouraged, so would suggest you use the standard loop like "foreach":

onExport: function () {
  var sFileName = "newFile";

  var oModel = this.getView().getModel("data"); // Assuming `this` is the controller instance.
  
  // Create a new workbook
  var oWB = XLSX.utils.book_new();

  // Loop over the worksheet names and export each to a sheet
  this.worksheetNames.forEach(function (sSheetName) {
    var aModelData = oModel.getProperty("/" + sSheetName + "/");

    // Convert JSON to worksheet
    var oWS = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(aModelData);

    // Add the worksheet to the workbook
    XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(oWB, oWS, sSheetName);
  });

  // Write the workbook to a file
  XLSX.writeFile(oWB, sFileName + ".xlsx");
}

SheetJS is available in Version 0.20.3 see https://docs.sheetjs.com/docs/getting-started/installation/frameworks

entry.title: Re: How to find CDS views for DB table fields
entry.content: Hello @AndreasGraeber, not as good as your tool, but maybe this helps: Extract CDS Names

entry.title: Building Your Business Castle: Meet the SAP Fieldglass Company Structure
entry.content:
Constructing a building is stressful. It involves complex planning, choosing the best location and the ideal materials, expenses, regulations, and tight deadlines. Organizing your company’s structure in SAP Fieldglass is like constructing a building, but without the stress. It’s as fun as playing with building blocks!

Whether you’re a buyer establishing business units, cost centers, and sites, or a supplier organizing offerings, the Company Structure section in the SAP Fieldglass admin menu is essential. It helps you create your company’s solid frame. But there’s more! You also define its particularities, like the company details.

So, dive in and get to work, because crafting your company’s structure is like constructing the ultimate block castle, where every piece matters!

ℹ️ For more information about the Company Structure section and the steps about how to manage their components, see:

  • Company Structure for Buyers
  • Company Structure for Suppliers

entry.title: Business objects BUS2032
entry.content: Hi all, I want to know what business objects are, its use in SAP and significance. I know BUS2032 is object for sales order, but does it have any configurations relevant for consultants? Any more additional information will be appreciated.

entry.title: Inquiry About Changing SAP SID and HANA DB SID in On-Premise High-Availability SAP System
entry.content:
Subject: Inquiry About Changing SAP SID and HANA DB SID in On-Premise High-Availability SAP System

 

 

I would like to inquire whether it is possible to change the SAP SID and HANA DB SID in an on-premise SAP system configured for High-Availability. If such a change is feasible, could you kindly provide the detailed steps or procedure required for performing this operation?

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry About Changing SAP SID and HANA DB SID in On-...
entry.content:
To rename the HANA instance you would follow the steps described in 

##2550327 How-To Rename an SAP HANA System

For the SAP instance please see

##11692 Renaming the system ID

Regarding the HANA replication
It would be best to unregister the secondary HANA site, do the rename on primary and secondary separately then when both done, re-register the secondary.

entry.title: Re: Display order of sections in New Learning Home page
entry.content: @barryelissa, as far as I can see, the places the customer cards can be added remain the same. There's an open enhancement request to improve this feature. You could review it and vote for it.

entry.title: Re: Migrate the ASE database (On-Prem) to the SAP hana Cl...
entry.content: Yes Javier. I understand migration of data is not possible with SAP ASMT tool. I was just trying to extract the data model. If I will be able to extract the data model then I'll able to move further for my work.

entry.title: Re: I update the little helper UI5 App to check if you received your badges
entry.content: I was just about to ask you for this on last year's post,Thank you Marian!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business AI Cheat Sheet – Your Quick Reference Guide
entry.content: That's a pretty good reference guide, thanks Raja.

entry.title: Multi-tenant is it possible to create destinations in the provider account.
entry.content:
I have a multi-tenant application that is using a service destination, currently my application is working when I have the destination in the tenant(consumer) account.

 

I would like to be able to define the destination in the provider account (to avoid create the service destination multiple times for each tenant)

I tried to create the destination in the provider account the same way as I have it in the consumer tenant account but it is not working:

 I get this error:

GET request to /customers/odata/v4/customers/$metadata?sap-language=EN completed with status 500 Error while retrieving destination customer-tent-api-dev from destination service. HTTP status code: 404, token details: {"subdomain":"XXX-t0002","serviceInstanceId":"4680f6bb-099b-4356-9a1e-d1152d9779b1","clientId":"sb-clone4680f6bb099b43569a1ed1152d9779b1!b213793|destination-xsappname!b62","expiration":1727749920,"roleCollections":["Subaccount Administrator"]}

any guidance is appreciated.

Thanks,

Tatiana

entry.title: How change the formate date of EXCEL templete in SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi friends!

I need to change the format of some templetes in Excel add-in of SAP IBP, before the format was for example: "Jan 01 - 2024 W01" and now is W01 2024 (only show the week and the year), I want to back to the previous format.

I didn't found infomation clear that could help me with this case.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Marco and for a long time I worked in the technology field in different areas. SAP has always been close to my work and has sparked my curiosity to learn. I believe it's time for a career change, and I am confident I can achieve my goal.

I have a degree in Technology and Systems Development Analysis and a postgraduate degree in project management. I hope to contribute with my knowledge and enhance my experience.

entry.title: Re: SAP LBN Freight Collaboration: TM Integration
entry.content: Is this available for any SAP TM version? I'd like to know if I can follow this steps with SAP TM 9.4

entry.title: Posting stock from f2 to z2
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to know whether any of you have faced the situation where you have got multiple Storage Locations in S4 Hana which are mapped to one EWM warehouse number resulting in creation of multiple Availability Group as mapping of RP storage location to EWM can't have same Availability Group for two Different Storage Locations.

In such scenario where we Perform SLOC to SLoc transfer via 1 step which result in pointing stock from Stock type F2 to Z* .in such case if storage type have the availability group assigned then it result in error

But if WPT is determining the Availability group that is it possible to perform the posting form F2 to Z* or we need badi implementation?

entry.title: SEEK ASSISTANCE FROM GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES TO RECOVER YOUR STOLEN, SCAMMED OR LOST CRYPTO ASSETS.
entry.content: Running an urban farming venture in Oklahoma has been a fulfilling pursuit, but an unforeseen financial catastrophe threw me off course. I became a victim of a forex scam, resulting in a loss of $143,000. This significant setback was not only financially damaging but also emotionally draining, leaving me distressed and worried about the future of my farming operations. Seeking a resolution, I began researching ways to recover my lost funds and came across GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES. Their reputation for handling such cases efficiently gave me hope that I might be able to recover my money. I reached out to them, hoping their expertise could offer a solution. From the start, GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES impressed me with their professionalism and thorough understanding of the complexities involved in forex scams. They presented a clear strategy for recovering my funds and maintained excellent communication throughout the process. They provided regular updates, answered all my questions, and offered detailed explanations at every step. The efficiency of their service was remarkable. In a surprisingly short amount of time, GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES managed to recover the full $143,000 that I had lost. This swift and complete recovery not only eased my financial strain but also restored my confidence and peace of mind. What distinguished GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES was their genuine concern for my situation and their client-centered approach. They went above and beyond to ensure that I felt supported and informed throughout the entire recovery process. Their dedication made a significant difference during a challenging period, turning a complex and stressful situation into a manageable one. If you find yourself facing the aftermath of a financial scam, I highly recommend GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES. Their expertise in fund recovery, combined with their compassionate and efficient service can provide crucial support and relief. Reaching out to them could be the key to regaining your hard earned funds.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: I recently tried VS Code to create tutorial for Devtoberfest and @eshrinivasan helped with this extension to preview the UI before pushing to Q or Prod. I'm glad to know about this which avoids lots of commits...

entry.title: Re: Multi-tenant is it possible to create destinations in...
entry.content:
Have you checked the documentation:

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#use-destinations-from-subscriber-account

?

entry.title: Re: Instructor Led Course limit Number of Days
entry.content: @carolinafaria, there's an open enhancement request to make the number of days greater. Currently, 60 it'd be the limit. Another class would be required to fulfill the 90 days.

entry.title: Becoming a Super Admin: Take Control with SAP Fieldglass Configuration Manager
entry.content:
Are you an SAP Fieldglass Administrator? Now, imagine being a Super Admin! That’s a reality, with the Configuration Manager role! No need to call support for help. As a Configuration Manager, you’re the commander of your own operations. The Self-Service Dashboard is your command center, equipped with all the strategic tools you need. Lost in complex setups? The wizard guides are your mission maps. And the integration section is your intelligence hub, showing statuses and alerts. Nothing escapes your radar!

Like being in charge of a command center, as a Configuration Manager you can supervise every critical function, making sure your operations are smooth and efficient. Check exactly what you can do as this super user and how to perform the available actions here.

entry.title: CONSULT GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES TO RECOVER YOUR CRYPTO ASSET LOST TO FRAUDULENT INVESTMENT PLATFORM.
entry.content: Running an urban farming venture in Oklahoma has been a fulfilling pursuit, but an unforeseen financial catastrophe threw me off course. I became a victim of a forex scam, resulting in a loss of $143,000. This significant setback was not only financially damaging but also emotionally draining, leaving me distressed and worried about the future of my farming operations. Seeking a resolution, I began researching ways to recover my lost funds and came across GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES. Their reputation for handling such cases efficiently gave me hope that I might be able to recover my money. I reached out to them, hoping their expertise could offer a solution. From the start, GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES impressed me with their professionalism and thorough understanding of the complexities involved in forex scams. They presented a clear strategy for recovering my funds and maintained excellent communication throughout the process. They provided regular updates, answered all my questions, and offered detailed explanations at every step. The efficiency of their service was remarkable. In a surprisingly short amount of time, GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES managed to recover the full $143,000 that I had lost. This swift and complete recovery not only eased my financial strain but also restored my confidence and peace of mind. What distinguished GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES was their genuine concern for my situation and their client-centered approach. They went above and beyond to ensure that I felt supported and informed throughout the entire recovery process. Their dedication made a significant difference during a challenging period, turning a complex and stressful situation into a manageable one. If you find yourself facing the aftermath of a financial scam, I highly recommend GRAYWARE TECH SERVICES. Their expertise in fund recovery, combined with their compassionate and efficient service can provide crucial support and relief. Reaching out to them could be the key to regaining your hard earned funds.

entry.title: From Confusion to Clarity: How the SAP Fieldglass PSA Team Can Help You
entry.content:
Does SAP Fieldglass feel like an obscure world where you're searching for better solutions and resources, but still have much to discover? Imagine having an expert guide to lead you through its features, optimizations, and best practices to achieve your business goals. Meet the Product Success Advisory (PSA) Team – a dedicated group of skilled Solution Consultants here to help you drive product adoption and maximize the value of your application. If you need information about features, best practices, and business requirement consultation, the PSA Team is your best choice.

Buckle up!

Discover everything that the PSA Team can help you with and how to engage them here. Let the PSA navigators chart the best course through the complexities of SAP Fieldglass, ensuring you reach your business destinations efficiently!

Disclaimer: the image used is my original compilation based on an image with ‘free to use and modify' license, according to Google search. The image of the Cat Driving a Car meme is used here in accordance with fair use license for the purposes of parody.

entry.title: Query about depreciation calculation in fixed assets
entry.content:
Hola a todos,

En 2020, implementamos SAP y durante la carga inicial de activos fijos, los activos antiguos se ingresaron con fechas incorrectas. Los activos que eran del año 2015 se registraron con fecha de adquisición en 2020. (Imagen 1)

Corregimos la fecha de inicio de la depreciación a la correcta (30 de abril de 2015) y recalculamos los valores. (Imagen 2)

Sin embargo, al revisar los nuevos valores de depreciación, no parecen tener sentido. (Imagen 3)

El tema es que en agosto hay un monto diferente y el resto se prorratea entre los demás meses. Mis preguntas hijo:

  1. ¿Por qué SAP calculó un monto diferente para agosto y luego lo prorrateó entre los meses siguientes?
  2. ¿Cuál es la base de estos cálculos en SAP?

Esperábamos que toda la diferencia de depreciación se registrara en agosto y que a partir de los meses siguientes se reflejara el monto correcto de $ -777,238.

El activo se cargó con los siguientes detalles:

Imagen 4

Imagen 5

El importe que debió depreciarse es el siguiente:

  • Valor de compra: $93,268,568
  • Meses: 120
  • Depreciación mensual: $-777,238

Agradecería mucho cualquier ayuda para comprender y resolver este problema.

Atentamente,

Aurora.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi @Amit56 

Please refer to the note for Windows users at the end of step 4 in the instructions. You're likely on a Windows machine, so you need to change import statements to use / instead of \. From your error messages, I believe that's the issue.
